metadata_json.revision_goal: Baseline deliverables are present and the calibration note reproduces the packet, deltas, flags, hypotheses, uncertainty analysis, and decision table. The deterministic artifact-contract checks passed. Two issues reduce verification confidence: (1) the calibration_note.md preview is truncated partway through the final decision table, preventing direct inspection of the complete decision table in the preview; (2) the grader/raw outputs include an asserted semantic_score (1.0) while limitations and deterministic precheck note that semantic correctness was not executed, creating an internal inconsistency. Addressing these will make verification fully auditable.
